headline: Visa World Cup Gift Card Ties Sports Partnership To Undervalued Stock Story
summary: Visa and Blackhawk Network are launching a limited-edition digital FIFA World Cup 2026 Activ Visa Gift Card. The product ties Visa's brand to FIFA World Cup 2026 and targets both fan engagement and business incentive programs. The card is distributed through digital channels, focusing on online gifting and rewards use cases. For investors watching NYSE:V, this product sits against a share price of $322.39 and a mixed return profile. The stock is down 7.0% year to date and down 7.9% over the...
